title: draba oreadum
intro: Draba oreadum, also known as alpine whitlowgrass, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, due to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. In herbal medicine, Draba oreadum is often prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve, and is used topically to treat skin conditions and promote tissue repair.
